description: A contemporary figurative painting showing two women standing at a seaside promenade railing, turned toward each other in conversation. The woman at left wears a red dress with white decorative crosses or bows and sunglasses; the woman at right wears a green dress with large white polka dots. Both have dark curled hair in a mid-twentieth-century style. Behind and below the railing, a man in a white shirt is partially visible. In the background, a bright coastal landscape extends with green grass, a sandy beach, blue sea, and distant mountains under a pale sky.
